title: Native Select
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Native Select wrapper using native select, option, and optgroup markup.

registry.reason: shadcn Native Select uses the local class composition helper.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native helper.
Provides Effect Schema literals for Native Select size and direction options.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin chevron icon is represented by a local inline SVG helper in this batch.
Origin language selector runtime dependency is replaced by local RTL example constants and origin fixture aliases.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

examples.title: NativeSelectDemo
NativeSelectDisabled
NativeSelectGroups
examples.snippet:
export const NativeSelectGroups = (): Html =>
  nativeSelect({
    children: [
      option('', ['Select department']),
      optGroup('Engineering', [
        option('frontend', ['Frontend']),
        option('backend', ['Backend']),
        option('devops', ['DevOps']),
      ]),
      optGroup('Sales', [
        option('sales-rep', ['Sales Rep']),
        option('account-manager', ['Account Manager']),
        option('sales-director', ['Sales Director']),
      ]),
      optGroup('Operations', [
        option('support', ['Customer Support']),
        option('product-manager', ['Product Manager']),
        option('ops-manager', ['Operations Manager']),
      ]),
    ],
  })

examples.title: NativeSelectInvalid
NativeSelectRtl
examples.description: RTL native select example with local Arabic strings.

deviations.summary: Chevron icon uses a local inline SVG instead of lucide-react.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on lucide-react. The local SVG preserves the native-select icon slot, geometry, and aria-hidden contract.

deviations.summary: RTL example uses local constants instead of the origin language-selector runtime dependency.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin app language selector. Local Arabic example constants preserve the default RTL rendered output while fixture aliases keep the origin evidence bundleable.
